---
title: "World cup Tables"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
  word_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Libraries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Load data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
wc_matches <- read.csv("matches.csv")
teams <- read.csv("teams.csv")
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Select and join confederation info ───────────────────────────────────────
wc_matches_clean <- wc_matches %>%
  select(
    tournament_id, tournament_name, match_name, stage_name, group_stage, knockout_stage, home_team_name, away_team_name, score, home_team_score, away_team_score, extra_time, penalty_shootout, score_penalties, home_team_score_penalties, away_team_score_penalties, result, home_team_win, away_team_win, draw
  ) %>%
  left_join(teams %>% select(team_name, confederation_code), # Add home confederation
            by = c("home_team_name" = "team_name")) %>%
  rename(home_conf = confederation_code) %>%
  left_join(teams %>% select(team_name, confederation_code), # Add away confederation
            by = c("away_team_name" = "team_name")) %>%
  rename(away_conf = confederation_code)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Fix confederation edge cases and unify West Germany → Germany ─────────────
# Australia moved from OFC to AFC in 2006
# Israel competed in 1970 under AFC
wc_matches_clean <- wc_matches_clean %>%
  mutate(
    wc_year = as.numeric(str_extract(tournament_id, "\\d{4}")),
    home_conf = ifelse(home_team_name == "Australia" & wc_year <= 2006, "OFC", home_conf),
    away_conf = ifelse(away_team_name == "Australia" & wc_year <= 2006, "OFC", away_conf),
    away_conf = ifelse(away_team_name == "Israel" & wc_year == 1970, "AFC", away_conf),
  )
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Derived match-level variables ─────────────────────────────────────────────
wc_matches_clean <- wc_matches_clean %>%
  mutate(
    # Treat penalty shootout results as draws in regulation
    home_team_win = if_else(penalty_shootout == 1, 0, home_team_win),
    away_team_win = if_else(penalty_shootout == 1, 0, away_team_win),
    draw          = if_else(penalty_shootout == 1, 1, draw),

    # Sorted confederation pair for consistent grouping
    conf_pair = if_else(
      home_conf < away_conf,
      paste(home_conf, away_conf, sep = "-"),
      paste(away_conf, home_conf, sep = "-")
    ),

    # Match winner (regulation only)
    winner_team = case_when(
      home_team_win == 1 ~ home_team_name,
      away_team_win == 1 ~ away_team_name,
      TRUE               ~ NA_character_
    ),
    winner_conf = case_when(
      home_team_win == 1 ~ home_conf,
      away_team_win == 1 ~ away_conf,
      TRUE               ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # Penalty shootout winner
    pen_winner = case_when(
      penalty_shootout == 1 & result == "home team win" ~ home_team_name,
      penalty_shootout == 1 & result == "away team win" ~ away_team_name,
      TRUE                                              ~ NA_character_
    ),
    conf_pen_winner = case_when(
      penalty_shootout == 1 & result == "home team win" ~ home_conf,
      penalty_shootout == 1 & result == "away team win" ~ away_conf,
      TRUE                                              ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# Creating a database of only men's world cup matches
wc_men <- wc_matches_clean %>%
  filter(!str_detect(tournament_name, "Women's"))
# Matches after the first group stage including second group stage matches
# Does not exclude matches from 1934 World Cup since they are all knockouts
past_first_stage <- wc_men %>%
  filter(!str_detect(stage_name, regex("^group stage$", ignore_case = TRUE)))
# Matches of only knockout games
ko_matches <- past_first_stage %>%
  filter(knockout_stage == 1)
# Inter-confederation matches only
wc_inter <- wc_men %>%
  filter(home_conf != away_conf)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Confederation head-to-head summary ───────────────────────────────────────
conf_summary <- wc_inter %>%
  group_by(conf_pair) %>%
  reframe(
    conf1 = str_split_fixed(conf_pair, "-", 2)[,1],
    conf2 = str_split_fixed(conf_pair, "-", 2)[,2],
    matches = n(),
    
    conf1_wins = sum(
      (home_conf == conf1) * home_team_win +
      (away_conf == conf1) * away_team_win
    ),
    conf2_wins = sum(
      (home_conf == conf2) * home_team_win +
      (away_conf == conf2) * away_team_win
    ),
    draws = sum(draw),
    
    conf1_goals = sum(
      (home_conf == conf1) * home_team_score +
      (away_conf == conf1) * away_team_score
    ),
    conf2_goals = sum(
      (home_conf == conf2) * home_team_score +
      (away_conf == conf2) * away_team_score
    ),
    
    conf1_goals_per_game = conf1_goals / matches,
    conf2_goals_per_game = conf2_goals / matches,
    
    # Confederation wins including penalty shootouts
    conf1_wins_wp = conf1_wins + sum(conf_pen_winner == conf1, na.rm = TRUE),
    conf2_wins_wp = conf2_wins + sum(conf_pen_winner == conf2, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    conf1_winrate = conf1_wins / matches,
    conf2_winrate = conf2_wins / matches,
    draw_rate = draws / matches,
    conf1_win_wp_rate = conf1_wins_wp / matches,
    conf2_win_wp_rate = conf2_wins_wp / matches
  ) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Country-level table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
country_table <- bind_rows(
  wc_men %>% transmute(
    team = home_team_name, conf = home_conf,
    wins = home_team_win, draws = draw,
    losses = as.integer(home_team_win == 0 & draw == 0),
    goals = home_team_score, ga = away_team_score
  ),
  wc_men %>% transmute(
    team = away_team_name, conf = away_conf,
    wins = away_team_win, draws = draw,
    losses = as.integer(away_team_win == 0 & draw == 0),
    goals = away_team_score, ga = home_team_score
  )
) %>%
  group_by(team, conf) %>%
  summarise(
    matches = n(),
    wins    = sum(wins),
    draws   = sum(draws),
    losses  = sum(losses),
    goals   = sum(goals),
    ga      = sum(ga),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gd       = goals - ga,
    pts      = wins * 3 + draws,
    win_rate = wins / matches
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pts), desc(gd), desc(goals))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Confederation vs confederation table ─────────────────────────────────────
conf_table <- bind_rows(
  wc_inter %>% transmute(
    conf = home_conf,
    goals_for = home_team_score, goals_against = away_team_score,
    win = home_team_win, draw, loss = away_team_win
  ),
  wc_inter %>% transmute(
    conf = away_conf,
    goals_for = away_team_score, goals_against = home_team_score,
    win = away_team_win, draw, loss = home_team_win
  )
) %>%
  group_by(conf) %>%
  summarise(
    matches        = n(),
    wins           = sum(win),
    draws          = sum(draw),
    losses         = sum(loss),
    goals          = sum(goals_for),
    ga             = sum(goals_against),
    gd             = goals - ga,
    win_rate       = wins / matches,
    goals_per_game = round(goals / matches, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(win_rate))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# ── Confederation win rate heatmap ───────────────────────────────────────────
all_confs <- sort(unique(c(conf_summary$conf1, conf_summary$conf2)))

# Build full grid and fill both directions from conf_summary
conf_heatmap <- expand_grid(conf1 = all_confs, conf2 = all_confs) %>%
  left_join(
    bind_rows(
      conf_summary %>% select(conf1, conf2, winrate = conf1_winrate),
      conf_summary %>% select(conf1 = conf2, conf2 = conf1, winrate = conf2_winrate)
    ),
    by = c("conf1", "conf2")
  ) %>%
  mutate(winrate = if_else(conf1 == conf2, NA_real_, winrate))

ggplot(conf_heatmap, aes(x = conf1, y = conf2, fill = winrate)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = if_else(!is.na(winrate), percent(winrate, accuracy = 0.1), "")),
    color = "black", size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#f9f9f9", high = "#0072B2",
    name = "Win rate", na.value = "white"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Confederation vs Confederation Win Rates",
    x = "Confederation",
    y = "Opponent Confederation"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid   = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r include=FALSE}
pairwise_results <- combn(conf_table$conf, 2, simplify = FALSE) %>%
  map_dfr(~ {
    d <- conf_table %>% filter(conf %in% .x)
    prop.test(d$wins, d$matches) %>%
      tidy() %>%
      mutate(conf1 = .x[1], conf2 = .x[2]) %>%
      select(conf1, conf2, p_value = p.value)
  }) %>%
  mutate(
    p_bonferroni = p.adjust(p_value, method = "bonferroni"),
    p_bh         = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    sig            = ifelse(p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
    sig_bonferroni = ifelse(p_bonferroni < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
    sig_bh         = ifelse(p_bh        < 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_value)
```

```{r include=FALSE}
ggplot(conf_table, aes(x = goals_per_game, y = win_rate, label = conf, color = conf)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(vjust = -1, size = 4.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, max(conf_table$win_rate) * 1.15)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(conf_table$goals_per_game) * 1.1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Confederation Performance at the World Cup",
    subtitle = "Win Rate vs. Goals Per Game (Inter-Confederation Matches Only)",
    x = "Goals Per Game",
    y = "Win Percentage",
    caption = "Data: FIFA World Cup Matches | Analysis in R"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40")
  )
```

```{r include=FALSE}
prep_conf_matrix <- function(data, metrics = c("win_rate", "goals_per_game", "ga")) {
  data %>%
    select(conf, all_of(metrics)) %>%
    column_to_rownames("conf") %>%
    scale()
}

# Hierarchical clustering
conf_scaled   <- prep_conf_matrix(conf_table)
dist_mat      <- dist(conf_scaled, method = "euclidean")
hclust_model  <- hclust(dist_mat, method = "ward.D2")

plot(hclust_model,
     main = "Hierarchical Clustering of Confederation Performance",
     xlab = "Confederation", sub = "", ylab = "Distance")
rect.hclust(hclust_model, k = 3, border = "blue")

conf_clustered_hc <- conf_table %>%
  mutate(cluster = cutree(hclust_model, k = 3))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
conf_summary_ko <- ko_matches %>%
  filter(home_conf != away_conf) %>%
  group_by(conf_pair) %>%
  summarise(
    conf1 = str_split_fixed(conf_pair, "-", 2)[1, 1],
    conf2 = str_split_fixed(conf_pair, "-", 2)[1, 2],
    matches   = n(),
    conf1_wins = sum((home_conf == conf1) * home_team_win +
                     (away_conf == conf1) * away_team_win),
    conf2_wins = sum((home_conf == conf2) * home_team_win +
                     (away_conf == conf2) * away_team_win),
    draws      = sum(draw),
    conf1_goals = sum((home_conf == conf1) * home_team_score +
                      (away_conf == conf1) * away_team_score),
    conf2_goals = sum((home_conf == conf2) * home_team_score +
                      (away_conf == conf2) * away_team_score),
    conf1_wins_wp = conf1_wins + sum(conf_pen_winner == conf1, na.rm = TRUE),
    conf2_wins_wp = conf2_wins + sum(conf_pen_winner == conf2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    conf1_goals_per_game  = conf1_goals  / matches,
    conf2_goals_per_game  = conf2_goals  / matches,
    conf1_winrate         = conf1_wins   / matches,
    conf2_winrate         = conf2_wins   / matches,
    draw_rate             = draws        / matches,
    conf1_win_wp_rate     = conf1_wins_wp / matches,
    conf2_win_wp_rate     = conf2_wins_wp / matches
  )
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
set.seed(123)
conf_scaled_km <- prep_conf_matrix(conf_table, metrics = c("win_rate", "goals_per_game"))
km_model       <- kmeans(conf_scaled_km, centers = 3, nstart = 25)

conf_clustered_km <- conf_table %>%
  mutate(cluster = factor(km_model$cluster))

ggplot(conf_clustered_km, aes(x = goals_per_game, y = win_rate,
                               label = conf, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(vjust = -1, size = 4.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     limits = c(0, 0.6)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "Cluster") +
  labs(
    title    = "Confederation Clusters via K-Means",
    subtitle = "Based on Win Rate and Goals Per Gamedata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABIAAAASCAYAAABWzo5XAAAAbElEQVR4Xs2RQQrAMAgEfZgf7W9LAguybljJpR3wEse5JOL3ZObDb4x1loDhHbBOFU6i2Ddnw2KNiXcdAXygJlwE8OFVBHDgKrLgSInN4WMe9iXiqIVsTMjH7z/GhNTEibOxQswcYIWYOR/zAjBJfiXh3jZ6AAAAAElFTkSuQmCC",
    x = "Goals Per Game",
    y = "Win Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
country_table %>%
  mutate(win_rate = percent(win_rate, accuracy = 0.1)) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Country", "Conf", "MP", "W", "D", "L",
                  "GF", "GA", "GD", "Pts", "Win%"),
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c",
                 "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    longtable = TRUE,
    caption  = "All-Time World Cup Record by Country"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "repeat_header"),
    font_size     = 8,
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F5C99")
```
\newpage
```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
conf_table %>%
  mutate(
    win_rate       = percent(win_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    goals_per_game = round(goals_per_game, 2)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Confederation", "MP", "W", "D", "L",
                  "GF", "GA", "GD", "Win%", "Goals/G"),
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c",
                 "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption  = "Confederation Performance in Inter-Confederation Matches"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"),
    font_size     = 11,
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F5C99")
```
\newpage
``` {r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
conf_summary %>%
  mutate(
    conf1_winrate     = percent(conf1_winrate,     accuracy = 0.1),
    conf2_winrate     = percent(conf2_winrate,     accuracy = 0.1),
    draw_rate         = percent(draw_rate,         accuracy = 0.1),
    conf1_win_wp_rate = percent(conf1_win_wp_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    conf2_win_wp_rate = percent(conf2_win_wp_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    across(c(conf1_goals_per_game, conf2_goals_per_game), ~ round(.x, 2))
  ) %>%
  select(conf1, conf2, matches,
         conf1_wins, conf2_wins, draws,
         conf1_winrate, conf2_winrate, draw_rate,
         conf1_goals_per_game, conf2_goals_per_game,
         conf1_wins_wp, conf2_wins_wp,
         conf1_win_wp_rate, conf2_win_wp_rate) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("C1", "C2", "MP",
                  "C1 W", "C2 W", "D",
                  "C1 W%", "C2 W%", "D%",
                  "C1 G/G", "C2 G/G",
                  "C1 W+P", "C2 W+P",
                  "C1 W%+P", "C2 W%+P"),
    align    = c("l", "l", rep("c", 13)),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption  = "Head-to-Head Confederation Records (All Matches)"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 9
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F5C99") %>%
  add_footnote("W+P = wins including penalty shootouts. W%+P = win rate including penalties.",
               notation = "none")
```
\newpage
``` {r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
conf_summary_ko %>%
  mutate(
    conf1_winrate     = percent(conf1_winrate,     accuracy = 0.1),
    conf2_winrate     = percent(conf2_winrate,     accuracy = 0.1),
    draw_rate         = percent(draw_rate,         accuracy = 0.1),
    conf1_win_wp_rate = percent(conf1_win_wp_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    conf2_win_wp_rate = percent(conf2_win_wp_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    across(c(conf1_goals_per_game, conf2_goals_per_game), ~ round(.x, 2))
  ) %>%
  select(conf1, conf2, matches,
         conf1_wins, conf2_wins, draws,
         conf1_winrate, conf2_winrate, draw_rate,
         conf1_goals_per_game, conf2_goals_per_game,
         conf1_wins_wp, conf2_wins_wp,
         conf1_win_wp_rate, conf2_win_wp_rate) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("C1", "C2", "MP",
                  "C1 W", "C2 W", "D",
                  "C1 W%", "C2 W%", "D%",
                  "C1 G/G", "C2 G/G",
                  "C1 W+P", "C2 W+P",
                  "C1 W%+P", "C2 W%+P"),
    align    = c("l", "l", rep("c", 13)),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption  = "Head-to-Head Confederation Records (Knockout Matches Only)"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 9
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F5C99") %>%
  add_footnote("W+P = wins including penalty shootouts. W%+P = win rate including penalties.",
               notation = "none")
```
\newpage
``` {r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pairwise_results %>%
  mutate(
    p_value      = formatC(p_value,      format = "e", digits = 2),
    p_bonferroni = formatC(p_bonferroni, format = "e", digits = 2),
    p_bh         = formatC(p_bh,         format = "e", digits = 2)
  ) %>%
  select(conf1, conf2, p_value, p_bonferroni, p_bh,
         sig_bonferroni, sig_bh) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Conf 1", "Conf 2", "p-value",
                  "p (Bonferroni)", "p (BH)",
                  "Sig (Bonf)", "Sig (BH)"),
    align    = c("l", "l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    caption  = "Pairwise Proportion Tests — Win Rate Differences"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F5C99") %>%
  add_footnote(
    "Significant at alpha = 0.05. Bonferroni is conservative; BH controls false discovery rate.",
    notation = "none"
  )
```
